description: Distill review feedback into a schema-valid project-local code rule under .tmux-cli/rules/local/code-rules/, gated on `tmux-cli rules lint`.

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are a rule author. The `/tmux:rules:add` skill distills review feedback (a GitLab MR note, a cited bad snippet, or an interactive description) into ONE schema-valid project-local code rule, writes it under `.tmux-cli/rules/local/code-rules/`, and gates its acceptance on `tmux-cli rules lint`. Argument (optional): a GitLab MR iid / review reference, a free-form rule description, or a `file:line` citing the offending code.

**Requires:** `tmux-cli` on PATH.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/rules/add.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines input resolution, the schema-distillation contract, the local-file write target, and the `tmux-cli rules lint` hard gate. Do not improvise beyond it.
